summary: Completed testing of Email Notification features (Iteration 8). Fixed critical bug in Notificaciones.jsx where API URL was missing /api prefix. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all SMTP fields, alert switches, and action buttons working correctly. 'Made with Emergent' badge confirmed removed.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, not blocking

passed_tests: PUT /api/config/notificaciones - Preserves password when masked value sent
POST /api/config/notificaciones/test - Fails with invalid SMTP (400 expected)
POST /api/config/notificaciones/send-test-email - Fails without valid SMTP (400 expected)
UI: Notificaciones tab visible in Configuración
UI: All SMTP form fields present (server, port, email, password)
UI: All alert switches present (7, 3, 1 days)
UI: All other switches present (enabled, responsables, weekly)
UI: All action buttons present (test connection, send test email, save, execute, send summary)
UI: 'Made with Emergent' badge removed from login page
UI: 'Made with Emergent' badge removed from dashboard

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: API URL missing /api prefix - was 'process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL' instead of '${process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed line 12 to include /api prefix like all other components

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed, 1 skipped - non-admin user not available)

seed_data_creation: Test notification config created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features fully tested: 1) Email notification endpoints at /api/config/notificaciones and /api/notificaciones/* all working. 2) Notificaciones.jsx UI component fully functional with SMTP config, alert switches (7/3/1 days), send to responsables, weekly summary options. 3) 'Made with Emergent' badge removed from index.html. Note: Real email sending requires valid Gmail SMTP credentials with App Password - test endpoints correctly return 400 when SMTP is invalid (expected behavior).
